case_title: ENCARNACAO, HAROLD DBA CALIMEX VS ACRO GRAPHICS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,621.17 FILED BY ENCARNACAO, HAROLD DBA CALIMEX AS TO DEFENDANT ACRO GRAPHICS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACRO GRAPHICS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENCARNACAO, HAROLD DBA CALIMEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACRO GRAPHICS, INC. $1,621.17 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,671.17, IF PLALINTIFF CASHES DEFENDANT'S CHECK FOR $625. THE JUDGMENT WILL BE REDUCED BY THAT AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AMENDED POS AS TO ARCO GRAPHICS INC FILED.
